name: Bill
subject: BIG endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYMZOyuQeancK8nQqla-xbk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=1)
Team — Amazing news, we just got one of our biggest endorsements yet: **The Boston Globe Editorial Board.**
Here’s what they had to say:
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYMZOyuQeancK8nQqla-xbk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=2)
This is just another example of how powerful our movement has become, and just at the right time, too.
Now we need you, Friend, to help us capitalize on this momentum and ensure folks across Super Tuesday states see this endorsement. [**Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help us get this major endorsement in front of as many people as possible?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYMZOyuQeancK8nQqla-xbk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=3)
| [SPREAD THE WORD →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYMZOyuQeancK8nQqla-xbk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=4)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=6) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200226_frs&n=7).

name: Booker for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| Our deadline is February 29th at 11:59 p.m. Hey there, we're following up on Cory's note from Monday. Since launching our $150,000 end-of-month goal, we've already raised _**$56,043**_. That means we're a little over 37% of the way there -- which is a great start. The bad news is that we're really running up against the clock here. February is already the shortest month of the year (even though it is one day longer thanks to the leap year!). There's not much time left. **Can you rush in a donation now to help? Our deadline is February 29th at 11:59 p.m. Here 's a link to chip in: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As always, thanks for being the best team out there. There's no way we can hit this goal without your help. Team Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Hey there, we're quickly approaching the end of the month. You know what that means: it's almost time to close the books on February and evaluate our fundraising for the month. My team crunched the numbers and they're telling me we need to raise _$150,000 by 11:59 p.m. on February 29th_ to stay on track. Staying on track isn't just a fundraising hook, team -- we need this money to make critical hires on the campaign and expand our reach in New Jersey. **I know we can do this. Can I count on you to contribute right now towards our end-of-month goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express22&amount=22&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express50&amount=50&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

I'm so grateful that we were able to get this re-election effort off to a fast start. As you may recall, we exceeded our January fundraising goal -- which allowed us to scale up quickly and begin building a formidable campaign.
**[Now, it's time to keep it going. Please chip in today -- $5, $10, $20, whatever you can -- to help us reach our critical February goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I bet Mitch McConnell and all of my Republican challengers will be watching closely to see if we're able to reach this goal. Let's prove to them that this grassroots team can always rise to the occasion.
Thanks in advance for stepping up when it matters most.
Sincerely,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200226_BFS_20200226-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa3/5fca0d19/7a3bb642/291d064b/69604648/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa3/5fca0d19/7a3bb642/291d064a/69604648/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa3/5fca0d19/7a3bb642/291d0649/69604648/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa3/5fca0d19/7a3bb642/291d0648/69604648/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: re: where to find the best fish in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Yes, we know Indiana is considered "landlocked." But we also know that Indiana is full of great places to grab a bite and the truth is that the... [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6e1559370eec48328e432b0716bd691f&_e=_IiuvhMgjRP9USoIi-yIrBUjTL4qkxe3rS6DU-JsMn0N8nEeM0abZaNWY7ndO2zrfSguGCcHd921NpB9EqsonN4H4I5x9ciQW6vDod9IynEb2cZNKOnQciSj9TXtDMGIiBTAs-mrjrB_dgvHCCCnZ4Qjim7uO7PdKqFwhTctcDOozUiuXMxSOQ4lpk9v0ePrv32BZRGvOkfTxE8SrLVPW2jrQsUHaoONuqSy3Gg1raz-DyVnMQTaU6iSxyc8IepSg5cB6g3UYbP4san5w9wZM8egmL8MRx9PwsSIhIwcsBABMdGH9A-QPeG73nU-5Wl6yYilcD6-LM3glrmyYP1MbYTJYZthTmfjNFhCsH6OWHDGyBAe7lwxSMjuGc87E0FZTrr9LycZ1yUkAR5c_quyZS6m_FVBnogVZpGO9l6V9zc%3D) Friend,

We know some Hoosiers are going to start eating a lot more fish this week (it’s already Ash Wednesday!).
In order to help those Hoosiers who celebrate Lent (and give some great restaurant recommendations to those who don’t!), Eric wanted to share some of his favorite seafood spots in Indiana.
**Yes, we know Indiana is considered "landlocked."**
But we also know that Indiana is full of great places to grab a bite and the truth is that the Hoosier State is home to some great places to get fish and chips, a fish sandwich, a classic fried catfish platter, and more.
Check out Eric’s list of the best seafood spots in Indiana below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6e1559370eec48328e432b0716bd691f&_e=_IiuvhMgjRP9USoIi-yIrBUjTL4qkxe3rS6DU-JsMn0N8nEeM0abZaNWY7ndO2zrfSguGCcHd921NpB9EqsonN4H4I5x9ciQW6vDod9IynEb2cZNKOnQciSj9TXtDMGIiBTAs-mrjrB_dgvHCCCnZ4Qjim7uO7PdKqFwhTctcDOozUiuXMxSOQ4lpk9v0ePrv32BZRGvOkfTxE8SrLVPW6eOBqDOG4PASsKwPpEz-3oRshlMVemFKz_nTxO63GVVOZUiGKLOrqYmov6DsroTO7VeFxbkTWauatzGbWfb0WlnRu6IwJAE35G6at6lyju7BOG9BGGCRZznATG6A4iRHoHXoUBoy9k8SLJL5nyYD7De9iG0O1NvvW_aZ40tAzPtVQa-yTiAR3l58rokYBgXkLksUPjV7pu1OdxVjn82KPs%3D)

clean_body: Yes, we know Indiana is considered "landlocked." But we also know that Indiana is full of great places to grab a bite and the truth is that the... Friend, We know some Hoosiers are going to start eating a lot more fish this week (it’s already Ash Wednesday!). In order to help those Hoosiers who celebrate Lent (and give some great restaurant recommendations to those who don’t!), Eric wanted to share some of his favorite seafood spots in Indiana. Yes, we know Indiana is considered "landlocked." But we also know that Indiana is full of great places to grab a bite and the truth is that the Hoosier State is home to some great places to get fish and chips, a fish sandwich, a classic fried catfish platter, and more. Check out Eric’s list of the best seafood spots in Indiana below! \- Jeffersonville, Clark County \- Schererville, Lake County \- Indianapolis, Marion County \- West Lafayette, Tippecanoe County \- Culver, Marshall County \- Indianapolis, Marion County \- Elmira, LaGrange County \- Stroh, LaGrange County Flash Survey Q: What's your favorite spot to get seafood in Indiana? That’s our list for this week! We hope you get a chance to visit any of these amazing seafood places in Indiana. Thanks, -Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Friend, We should be thankful for Michael Bloomberg's performance in last night's Democratic debate! **Bloomberg finally told us the truth by admitting he bought and paid for Kendra Horn 's election in 2018. ** Kendra Horn doesn't represent the values of Oklahoma's 5th congressional district, instead, she represents coastal, liberal elites. I pledge as your next representative in Congress, I will never accept a single dime from anyone who wants to install a nanny state, take away our guns, and supports unlimited abortions. **My vote for the people of Oklahoma will never be for sale.** Unfortunately, Kendra Horn's vote is for sale and the political establishment hopes to keep it that way. Bloomberg was willing to spend $400,000 in advertising last election cycle. There is no doubt he and his liberal friends will do the same thing this fall. **If we 're going to take our seat back from the liberal elites, we need to be able to match their spending and not be outmaneuvered. | | February may be the short month, but there's sure a lot going on. My focus? Securing Oregon's Senate seat and preparing to help my fellow Democratic Senate candidates win in challenging races all across America. Imagine what we can do after we win back the Senate and the White House! We can finally make progress tackling climate chaos. We can develop a comprehensive immigration policy founded on treating all humans with decency. We can take action to reduce gun violence in our schools and communities. We can restore integrity to the White House. And we can end corruption and put power back in the hands of the people. But to do that, we'll have to build the most powerful grassroots campaign in the history of this country. We're on our way, but we can't let up now. name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: ICYMI: Joshua Scott Interview on The Morning Answer
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gP0xOP7zSofBCP.&b=dDUU5X7qFeWfVeYGZwfFUg

Peter

We are now inside one week until the March 3 primary election, and the momentum continues to build for our campaign. We are feeling good, but we are definitely not going to stop working hard every single day through the election.

I hope you listened to my interview live on February 13 at 6:20am on 870am's The Morning Answer. The feedback has been great, and everyone seemed to love our discussion. If you weren't able to listen live, CLICK HERE TO LISTEN NOW

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gP0xOP7zSofBCP.&b=cZ25kgVPkVH9qWAcxlt7Uw
.

We are so proud of what we have been able to build on since our 2018 campaign, and the support throughout the San Gabriel Valley has been overwhelming. We are absolutely honored and humbled to have a supporter wear our campaign t-shirt during her baptism in Israel, and we have inspired like-minded Americans of all ages to express their patriotism with absolutely No Apologies.

clean_body: Image Peter We are now inside one week until the March 3 primary election, and the momentum continues to build for our campaign. We are feeling good, but we are definitely not going to stop working hard every single day through the election. I hope you listened to my interview live on February 13 at 6:20am on 870am's The Morning Answer. The feedback has been great, and everyone seemed to love our discussion. If you weren't able to listen live, CLICK HERE TO LISTEN NOW . We are so proud of what we have been able to build on since our 2018 campaign, and the support throughout the San Gabriel Valley has been overwhelming. We are absolutely honored and humbled to have a supporter wear our campaign t-shirt during her baptism in Israel, and we have inspired like-minded Americans of all ages to express their patriotism with absolutely No Apologies. Image Image Image Image Image Donate Thank you for your support thus far, but it is only the beginning. We will see you after the primary! name: Team Canning for Congress
subject: [The Oregonizer] "We've Got Her Back"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/qaeutgFgQP6Zd3TbHeWiFA/h0/Y-2FgbIxpjl7vCXwYlxcWe74cJIRNk1BsdXc03JixbMX3KgWMCbbSCydC3bZxBc1tJx4r5FFv8Wllz735lRuDeCmEW-2BarLSIGFVZkel8D4Q-2FyrhhuH3QplPIWyCP2J6-2BtzEUgHs5irbUJ3LWRLlDm-2FMb3T7PnSpW9FWA8U14ROXDacYPDNOVzxhdYNDKpPKWVDbqI5xNpLfUAhkRg-2FNBnBvVDFCD2yZNY-2BypjOnfGb6oOaThy7If-2FNYyU3Rlcr-2FQIPwoHDDXcvT4MuF0YyRFLPHbmF1UzDDI19g3U514KVkQcBUSZJc0QD-2FYUSRzXtfFm2/KOaX)
---
This campaign is moving ahead at full speed! This week I got to connect with fellow candidate Shahid Butar. Last weekend we had more volunteers than expected and almost ran out of flyers to give to voters. Don't worry, we've got more on the way. Join the Mass Canvas with Sunrise Movement Eugene on Saturday ----- or on Sunday!
---
|
---
Dear supporters,
I am so honored to receive the endorsement this week of the national progressive veterans organization Common Defense. For over a decade I have worked with veterans in the anti-war movement to expose abuses in US foreign policy and fight alongside veterans for the benefits they deserve. Common Defense members in our district have been instrumental in leading the development of our Veterans for Canning grassroots organizing group and our foreign policy platform to End the Forever wars. Now, with the backing of Common Defense, our campaign has been elevated alongside elected leaders like Rep. Ro Khanna, Senator Ed Markey, and Rep. Ilhan Omar - and rising challengers to long time incumbents like Jessica Cisneros (TX-28), Morgan Harper (OH-03) and Jamaal Bowman (NY-16). We are in great company and truly leading the national conversation on a progressive vision for US foreign policy. But if we want to bring this vision to Congress next year, first we have to win this primary. We are pushing hard to meet our end of month fundraising goals so that we can scale up our field organizing. Please make a donation and thank you for your support. Onward, Doyle
---

**IN THE NEWS...**
---
---
[**The Eugene Weekly**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/qaeutgFgQP6Zd3TbHeWiFA/h4/b2QTIghpuhxPHS-2FxFUcaCJiF0ZJUiIR1h3LSY4IoJXyQitYt8gn1MMm7Pj2yHJnWgEVVAlhw8owk8q3rsWf8wSOvau59HNB1HwKW1bXbocORPOZptLBuvcNMRHgirPCUs15evEDPjoZpmRrP4kj1uNb5o5137G1fwlCrZPNq1kYJeMKRb8Y9QumWK89gPgAI4Wo1mWO2qv4ahffIQMCuZSgpSqwJ7zKirhRdIa-2F5CHtarVC-2FHwD3cIUfUgILryH0kbYj1-2FuyKC2wU4i1CCJTmsDEcwbXLw6822YH4FdWjVOmtfflXstoDzBv7bb1NM2K/d0lZ) _**On The Canning Bus**_ "While Canning was finishing her degree, DeFazio was running what he calls a "grassroots" campaign which raised over $500,000 from corporate PACs in 2019 alone, most of which is designated to be used in the primary against Canning who takes zero corporate PAC money." -Colin Moran, Eugene
---
[**The Daily Emerald**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/qaeutgFgQP6Zd3TbHeWiFA/h5/8HtxoXUPdrEQnOlv5SQseLpwTDZ5hMUwiz8XFDRhAoFUXsHh-2FR7G2TVMb05etdlpflqwJXiFNxCbD5ViH6PgRlZkBEaAk1is4pKFNWCmgNnr88lpkT-2F4IWMOA1kdSzow1FkefvqPaPLJzmf2sk9D7jkvw42Pn8TvwOAxg6DPwoBz2i5i2GtZjUNG9w-2BiIh2VBdrgwMrTWmg-2FOue5CKbWsbspa1aSGNX510ANhPE-2Fck914RQAZq82mHlXSjPOT11-2FUp13NzOCYLl-2FGPLbb0ZFumJywETraMNe-2FJMfywTozodvjoE9KyiICUgUTVGXfHAmZQm1jXLm-2FuA3yEvJPNEGmb-2FkDJGP6oYv9vOidbLSgx2gktthubi5lvH48sKkhiYsZtYTVuAcT5owUR5a6HtImw-3D-3D/I6qm) _**On The Record: What In Politics is Most on Your Mind Right Now? **_ "I also think that it's interesting, especially with looking at local politicians like Peter DaFazio, or Doyle Canning, who's running in the primary, or even Sarah [Iannarone, candidate for Portland mayor] and looking on a national level, which candidates have actually addressed different interest groups in mind." -Kezia Setyawan, Eugene
---
[**KLCC.org**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/qaeutgFgQP6Zd3TbHeWiFA/h6/vgqJJ1YLr25uLDlqpz8i2-2BoFRJEGpz2eezTM3X3Rgrpkp2-2BivapV0Ey6uaNhmS-2B-2FIbSFxJ-2B5Rha-2F-2B08qlwzMJ6obau4YlerN0uWyYGNK6YMSImEooDL8IEBSWRmIT-2FTWJXJA98a9EWjUFtoSdGgevdzukw2HLSXaFFYC-2BJiBGm0t97fOGDwXesBB2b5M1igA6tZmsmRjF2Ir09MfjUMasr9X3CwqCVCJYnzw2RIYPV-2B5waJ7sT1nS-2FKNmnL5eqQAEsu2IIkRvKz3MI0Kb9tFnNAwa14nQRlwcZTLWy57U8T78WyYgw-2Bf0Eu6kkKIsNNXbMaVzySrhe6mLHkaX4ZMdYN9C4bsMY2ADeKgCkxNFK4-3D/xLtl) _**Environmental Justice Forum Hears from Federal and State Candidates**_ "You will never have to push me to take a stand on these issues," said Canning. "This is why I'm running. There is no conversation that is more important to me than the intersection of racism and the climate crisis." She specifically referred to the environmental racism in the Jordan Cove pipeline. "The Malin pumping station that would pump the gas into the pipeline in the South Eastern corner of Oregon adjacent to Klamath tribal lands, would create a pollution burden on that community--consistent with the statistical records that these facilities are almost always cited in communities of color, and have a disproportionate impact on communities of color and create health problems that can be deadly," said Canning." -Elizabeth Gabriel
---
|
---
**ANNOUNCEMENTS**
---
|
---

Their goal for the day is to knock 2,100 doors! Don't forget your smartphone, walking shoes, and a friend!

clean_body: | | | | This campaign is moving ahead at full speed! This week I got to connect with fellow candidate Shahid Butar. Last weekend we had more volunteers than expected and almost ran out of flyers to give to voters. Don't worry, we've got more on the way. Join the Mass Canvas with Sunrise Movement Eugene on Saturday ----- or on Sunday! | Dear supporters, I am so honored to receive the endorsement this week of the national progressive veterans organization Common Defense. For over a decade I have worked with veterans in the anti-war movement to expose abuses in US foreign policy and fight alongside veterans for the benefits they deserve. Common Defense members in our district have been instrumental in leading the development of our Veterans for Canning grassroots organizing group and our foreign policy platform to End the Forever wars. Now, with the backing of Common Defense, our campaign has been elevated alongside elected leaders like Rep. Ro Khanna, Senator Ed Markey, and Rep. Ilhan Omar - and rising challengers to long time incumbents like Jessica Cisneros (TX-28), Morgan Harper (OH-03) and Jamaal Bowman (NY-16). We are in great company and truly leading the national conversation on a progressive vision for US foreign policy. But if we want to bring this vision to Congress next year, first we have to win this primary. We are pushing hard to meet our end of month fundraising goals so that we can scale up our field organizing. Please make a donation and thank you for your support. Onward, Doyle ?linkid=7&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-2&emailreferrer=email734712_from983578&emailsubject=the-oregonizer-weve-got-her-back | | ENDORSEMENT ALERT | | IN THE NEWS... On The Canning Bus "While Canning was finishing her degree, DeFazio was running what he calls a "grassroots" campaign which raised over $500,000 from corporate PACs in 2019 alone, most of which is designated to be used in the primary against Canning who takes zero corporate PAC money." -Colin Moran, Eugene On The Record: What In Politics is Most on Your Mind Right Now? "I also think that it's interesting, especially with looking at local politicians like Peter DaFazio, or Doyle Canning, who's running in the primary, or even Sarah [Iannarone, candidate for Portland mayor] and looking on a national level, which candidates have actually addressed different interest groups in mind." -Kezia Setyawan, Eugene Environmental Justice Forum Hears from Federal and State Candidates "You will never have to push me to take a stand on these issues," said Canning. "This is why I'm running. There is no conversation that is more important to me than the intersection of racism and the climate crisis." She specifically referred to the environmental racism in the Jordan Cove pipeline. "The Malin pumping station that would pump the gas into the pipeline in the South Eastern corner of Oregon adjacent to Klamath tribal lands, would create a pollution burden on that community--consistent with the statistical records that these facilities are almost always cited in communities of color, and have a disproportionate impact on communities of color and create health problems that can be deadly," said Canning." -Elizabeth Gabriel | ANNOUNCEMENTS | This upcoming Saturday, February 29th, Sunrise Eugene will be hosting a mass canvassing for Canning event! Their goal for the day is to knock 2,100 doors! Don't forget your smartphone, walking shoes, and a friend! | Our final of three out-of-state meet and greets is approaching quickly! Bring your friends, a smart phone, and some walking shoes as we enjoy the warmer weather and spread the word about Doyle! Join our growing network of supporters by canvassing weekly in Corvallis! Bring your walking shoes and your friends! - | YES WE CAN... | NAACP FREEDOM FUND DINNER What a delight to hear Dr. Assensoh speak about the women of the movement who dared to sing the truth: Billie Holiday, Nina Simone, Aretha Franklin. name: Dr. Manny
subject: I have a plan to keep Tennessee safe from the Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
I am the only candidate who knows how to address this crisis
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtkodl-uunkhiuw-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, More than ever, I am so grateful for President Trump and his leadership in standing up for Americans to protect us from coronavirus. It's time for Congress to stop playing politics and act quickly to authorize the funding to take this crisis on. While Washingon tried to impeach our president, because they can't get over Hillary's loss in 2016, they should have been working with President Trump to prevent crises around the world, such as this. Today I introduced a plan to take on this coronavirus epidemic. It's an eight-point plan that addresses what we must do to keep our state and our country safe. The elites in Washington are more worried about their pocketbooks and not spooking the stock market, than they are with being honest about the potential crisis we face. It's time to start listening to doctors and health care professionals, and work with President Trump to protect Americans. [READ MY PLAN HERE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtkodl-uunkhiuw-j/) It's time to address this crisis, and work on a real solution. With Obamacare, we saw what happened when the Washington insiders listened to the elites, rather than the experts. I've been talking about this threat for weeks now, and I'm the only candidate in this race with a plan to address it. In the United States Senate, this is the same type of bold leadership you'll see from me. I'm so grateful to have your support. Thanks, Dr. Manny [_P.S. I can't do this without your help. Would you chip in $20 today, to help send a bold conservative outsider to represent us in the U.S. Senate?_](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtkodl-uunkhiuw-t/) [Donate now](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtkodl-uunkhiuw-i/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

While Washingon tried to impeach our president, because they can't get over Hillary's loss in 2016, they should have been working with President Trump to prevent crises around the world, such as this. Today I introduced a plan to take on this coronavirus epidemic. It's an eight-point plan that addresses what we must do to keep our state and our country safe. The elites in Washington are more worried about their pocketbooks and not spooking the stock market, than they are with being honest about the potential crisis we face. It's time to start listening to doctors and health care professionals, and work with President Trump to protect Americans. It's time to address this crisis, and work on a real solution. With Obamacare, we saw what happened when the Washington insiders listened to the elites, rather than the experts. I've been talking about this threat for weeks now, and I'm the only candidate in this race with a plan to address it. In the United States Senate, this is the same type of bold leadership you'll see from me. I'm so grateful to have your support. Thanks, Dr. Manny Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr. Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Bernie and Fidel
body:
Not feeling the Bern... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Bernie and Fidel](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-j/)
In the course of his political career, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the presidency, Bernie Sanders has had many wacky points of view. In this week's blog, I'll focus on one - Bernie's admiration of the communist dictator, Fidel Castro. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Bloomberg - Hillary Ticket?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-d/)
I first heard the story over the weekend that Mike Bloomberg might be considering Hillary Clinton as a vice presidential running mate. Like me, maybe this caught you by surprise? In this week's blog I write about how likely we could see a Bloomberg - Hillary Democrat ticket. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Fentanyl is a Killer](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-u/)
The good news is drug overdose deaths in the United States are down over the last year. The bad news is that there are still far too many. In this week's blog, I discuss what Congress is doing to help fight the opioid epidemic, specifically targeting fentanyl. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Four Days in February](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-n/)
Super Bowl Sunday, confusion in Iowa on Monday, State of the Union on Tuesday and today, Wednesday, President Trump will be acquitted! In this week's blog, I discuss this week's more interesting moments. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhtkfld-kujkulhluu-f/)

clean_body: Not feeling the Bern... No images? In the course of his political career, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the presidency, Bernie Sanders has had many wacky points of view. In this week's blog, I'll focus on one - Bernie's admiration of the communist dictator, Fidel Castro. Previous Blog Posts I first heard the story over the weekend that Mike Bloomberg might be considering Hillary Clinton as a vice presidential running mate. Like me, maybe this caught you by surprise? In this week's blog I write about how likely we could see a Bloomberg - Hillary Democrat ticket. The good news is drug overdose deaths in the United States are down over the last year. The bad news is that there are still far too many. In this week's blog, I discuss what Congress is doing to help fight the opioid epidemic, specifically targeting fentanyl. Super Bowl Sunday, confusion in Iowa on Monday, State of the Union on Tuesday and today, Wednesday, President Trump will be acquitted! In this week's blog, I discuss this week's more interesting moments. | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: You just lost $100
body:
Thanks a lot, Gov. Evers. No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-n/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,My fellow Republicans and I sent a $250 million tax cut to Tony Evers' desk, _to give the taxpayers some of their own money back_.It would have meant a **$106 tax cut** for the average taxpayer, or **$145 for those filing jointly**. But Tony Evers VETOED your tax cut today, _because he thinks he can spend YOUR money better than you can._ [Fight Back - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Fight Back - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Fight Back - $106](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) For my entire career in government, I've fought to give the taxpayers their own money back. I've balanced budgets, opposed tax hikes, and successfully passed $13 billion in total tax relief for Wisconsin taxpayers, including a property tax freeze.For me _,_ it's simple: _**When you over-pay for something, you deserve a refund.**_ For example, if your lunch today costs $8, and you pay $10, you get **YOUR** $2 back to use how you choose.The taxpayers overpaid, so we cut your taxes. Only one thing stood in the way: **Governor Evers thinking he knows how to spend it better.** Today might be a good day to choose to support the elected officials who put the taxpayers first... and let Tony Evers know whose side you're on!Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S. I've spent my entire career putting the taxpayers first, and I'll do the exact same thing in Congress! [Click here to join my campaign with a gift of $10, $20, or even $106](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndjydlt-ahkdjtlkr-i/)! Thanks - Fitz

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Electoral Experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Our 2018 Run Laid the Groundwork for 2020

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15474222/163380618/-1907457918?refcode=02142020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRmZjlmOS02ZjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buJMndNvQS0dm-5xKUX0NwoL2IW0JRZt8ff3wc4EZDM=)
---
Dear Friend, When I announced my 2020 candidacy in April of 2019, I couldn't have known that Mr. Flores would announce his retirement in September. When he did, the dynamic of the race changed dramatically, and the value of all the hard work of the prior two years became immediately apparent. The experience gained and lessons-learned from the 2018 run are irreplaceable. I don't share too many of them publicly, but I will share two. The first we call "No more wishful thinking." While all of our potential Republican opponents have weaknesses, it will take strategy, targeting, and a message that resonates with independents to get the job done. And that requires the expertise of a team of data, digital, and finance professionals, all of which we have on board, to take advantage of this once-in-a-decade opportunity. The second is the unfortunately obvious one. We need the financial resources to get that message out to 750,000 people spread over a 7,800 square mile district. We've got a strategy for that in place, and phase II of that kicks off on March 4th. But we still need your help. We've got an aggressive goal for February, and we're still $2,307.23 short. **[Please chip in any amount you so we can hit the ground running on March 4th!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15474223/163380619/-1907457918?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRmZjlmOS02ZjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buJMndNvQS0dm-5xKUX0NwoL2IW0JRZt8ff3wc4EZDM=)** | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15474224/163380620/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRmZjlmOS02ZjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buJMndNvQS0dm-5xKUX0NwoL2IW0JRZt8ff3wc4EZDM=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15474225/163380621/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRmZjlmOS02ZjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buJMndNvQS0dm-5xKUX0NwoL2IW0JRZt8ff3wc4EZDM=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15474226/163380622/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRmZjlmOS02ZjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buJMndNvQS0dm-5xKUX0NwoL2IW0JRZt8ff3wc4EZDM=)

The second is the unfortunately obvious one. We need the financial resources to get that message out to 750,000 people spread over a 7,800 square mile district. | NH House Democrats Pass a Pair of Anti-2nd Amendment Bills
---
---
| |
---
| Last week, Democrats in the NH House passed a pair of extremist, anti-2nd Amendment bills that, if they are to become law, could **drastically change firearm ownership in our state. **
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
[HB 1379-FN](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MTQ4Nzg1NDM2NTMwMzc1JmM9djJ3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMxNTMzNjgmZD1mN3Y1djBn.gu-u_zIwYTaune3G_p8Sr8pO0e7grrYHVJLM1bDaUTE) bans the private transfer of firearms with very limited exceptions. This bill would prohibit the transfer of firearms to friends, neighbors or extended family and would lead to the **creation of a database of all privately owned firearms in our state.** [HB 1101-FN](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MTQ4Nzg1NDM2NTMwMzc1JmM9djJ3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMxNTMzNzYmZD1yNXE3ajN6.iqGbbGDy7WQcOYWsCKvQOPGnXfNWqtbTdS_B0Vpjjns) would impose a 3-day waiting period on the purchase of firearms, **denying someone with the urgent need for immediate self defense the ability to legally purchase a firearm.**
---
| |
---
| These dangerous and unnecessary bills are likely just the beginning. Liberal Democrats will stop at nothing to erode away our 2nd Amendment rights. The NH Senate Republicans are going to fight this gun-grab tooth and nail, but we need your help! Please consider donating [$15, $25 or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans by clicking here!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MTQ4Nzg1NDM2NTMwMzc1JmM9djJ3OSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMxNTMzODYmZD1sNm4zaTVs.f2uk7PwVdXiXo6z8xnO6kOVdLQhSTqe9UekqO0Akzfg)
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| "It is imperative that as Republicans, we stand firmly against any infringement on our right to keep and bear arms. Taking firearms away from law abiding gun-owners is not the way to make us safer. Foolish bills such as these show a fundamental misunderstanding of our Constitution and will in fact make us less safe." -Senator Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro)

name: Team Hunt
subject: Join us on Election Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We have less than one week until election day and we're not going to stop until polls close at 7:00pm on March 3rd! But after polls close, we hope that you'll join us to watch the results come through.

Election night is the culmination of all the hard work that you, our volunteers and supporters, have put in over the past nine months to help get Wesley across the finish line! You are the engine that drives this campaign and we can't thank you enough for your continued friendship and support. We hope that you'll join us for this special evening.

Please RSVP to chris@wesleyfortexas.com.

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

Friend --

In just five days, San Diegans will have our voices heard at the polls. And it is crucial that our progressive voice — the voice that says yes to clean air and water, yes to ending houselessness, yes to treating immigrants with dignity — is heard the loudest.

Let’s get loud together by getting the word out over these next five days about our historic campaign:

**[Will you make sure our voice is heard with a quick contribution right now? Your donation will go right to work educating and turning out voters in San Diego who support the causes that you and I believe in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15484392/163459685/1136511447?refcode=em-200227-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDk1OTU0NC04YjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SW5tU2xraARMUG3NWQ-mZ8vDQb5h0_ZnQLeCSKy2fGM=)** I’m so glad we’re in this together!

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Do you want to live in a socialistic America?
body:
Peter,
Bernie Sanders notched up another decisive win in Nevada’s Caucuses. This sets him up as the Democrats’ definite front runner for president.
Frankly, I’m appalled, as any American should be, that an open socialist with fiscally ruinous policies and severely misplaced admiration of such communist utopias could be the nominee of a major political party - not in Venezuela or Cuba - but America.
I have one simple question. Do you want to live in a socialistic America? I know you don’t because you love freedom. And believe me, socialism is not free.
**But if Christians don’t vote, socialistic ideals could win. On average, 25 million Christians _don’t_ vote in presidential elections. That’s equivalent to 20 states not voting!**
Peter, I need your help. Together with your support, we will equip and activate non-voting Christians. **[We’re counting on you to answer the call to protect faith and freedom](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200227apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200227apl01nd&n=1).**
Americans have been so misled and miseducated that they would actually vote away their birthright for socialism’s poisonous, empty promises of “free stuff.”
Socialism has been spoonfed to our children, in our schools, and now Americans are surprised that our youth don’t know how horrible socialism is? They’re like Dr. Frankenstein being surprised that the monster he created turned on him. Unfortunately, now the monster is threatening the entire village.
**When Christians don’t vote, it comes at a tremendous cost.**
Americans may have the starkest choice in Presidential election history. It’s a collision of worldviews, and everything is at stake.
Voters will decide if it’s ok to intentionally end a baby’s life, toss out the rule of law, open our borders, turn our backs on our ally Israel, and do away with the freedom to practice our faith free from government intrusion.
The choice really will be “the most important election of our lifetime,” since it could determine whether America remains America or not. The consequences matter.
**[Will you please consider making an important gift to awaken the most powerful voting bloc in America](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200227apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200227apl01nd&n=2)?** Every dollar you give between now and November will make a difference in the future of our nation.
Thank you for your faithful support.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200227apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200227apl01nd&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**
Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200227apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200227apl01nd&n=5).

Today, the New York Working Families Party, the United Auto Workers Region 9A New York Area CAP Council, and Rockland United endorsed our campaign, adding to the momentum of endorsements we’ve received just this month. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/CgmkzXCfSWK91HSN8s2Txg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLwXpl23ipIPmHVGXHTL0dPbWlS7rC0C45ThGikh26bDbnWSI8LBguZjsMWgIEWR38WEYBnJz675kZ-2BcwXIV-2FFFDQWZujtzdnjpaFsHru0DccjUFpD8oX4mdIFBWwZ2jyBYYTTTNH7Vq2qK0HDfOmU61Xnr4Xa-2F1SfQ0o3MKsYOiGMjjMWmh9h0W-2BDqCPi5XidYvm2inz2KvzSDxb7TsvuzvIgMKwFHq0NX2VIMa-2FltpRW5gEd60wF3M9o3u4-2BUyrtYwwJ1krWbYNuu32TryEcfgIp5FCop7pZMbGp7NqY4aw-3D-3D/AJUe)
Friend, **** **** **** We have more exciting news for you.
Today, the New York Working Families Party, the United Auto Workers Region 9A New York Area CAP Council, and Rockland United endorsed our campaign, adding to the momentum of endorsements we’ve received just this month.
WFP, UAW, and RU endorsed Mondaire because he will fight on behalf of the millions of hardworking Americans when he’s elected to Congress. Raised in a working-class community, Mondaire understands the real-life struggles that working people face every day. We are so proud to have WFP, UAW, and RU stand with us in this fight. **_[Will you join them by making a contribution today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/CgmkzXCfSWK91HSN8s2Txg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLwXpl23ipIPmHVGXHTL0dPbWlS7rC0C45ThGikh26bDZweFqZJVjNJ7M8aK8ngWujTW9hHRUOjOcXlKAIp2OHpKs-2FBLHBFJkaeCWDBC7SYv5AvBrPvtKP7hgOudYi9yzmJFeQwZuTm1JwVRjr7WLp46DpseKCrdNmfACnFDCTRyyp6-2BCM5UDPBn4tzSxHca-2BmEGDuBX1fmB4OcsO-2BlBq9K5oJuxiSlE-2BBzDnsdzkEcBhbEX2N9S3gKW6Q81632q15XSbC0xCwh9UEu2817F3gOGg7FkuHK5IFFE-2B-2BK-2Bkn7gw-3D-3D/YNld)_**
This economy is broken for so many working people, so we need to send someone to Congress who will be a champion for them. WFP, UAW, and RU know that Mondaire is that person, but we still need every voter in the district to know that. And in order to get our message out and run a competitive campaign, we need to pick up the pace on our fundraising this month to hit our February goal. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us reach our February goal and help elect a champion for working people?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/CgmkzXCfSWK91HSN8s2Txg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLwXpl23ipIPmHVGXHTL0dPbWlS7rC0C45ThGikh26bDRPS3UDJ3fG9bYmMNCVakjGIMmah9kNHklYcmHYVvvH-2Fci9aVmoKMuVf0YySWsUm6t1NFBotkUc-2B9J1cVi2cf-2BsL8MSLtMEBhNGZGeBRtRVb2bvgYBpUAhqhLqbV7WxgQIEs8TzUNS2D6YjsRcNaM7Ybpkra0MFGEzdVmJJ6-2FOZJa-2BliZGPxp8SDIQ-2FOidOgxp6ARuxGuNdzy2zC-2FupWdv9Bc1y048lwJG7EqAUYNJSMoaiwEZZZVzE1eTHEz-2Fkt6g-3D-3D/A2sz)_** **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2zm/CgmkzXCfSWK91HSN8s2Txg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJaH41IzHOUC1XIAHEXKzhjUxj6clK-2Fk79mJOfmND1iXGyVCtvMWdw3hpT6fGiBkAqWSWtYq50tDv80AYxKh-2B-2FbPzp0BJ6JhmE7UBq7J5pKKgXN4RES-2Ft7xgPHmE6kMjVvQU-2F1-2FwygN7DoCqcsjzwdEbtUrTCM4z-2FlBCBDiWwiAtwR4r6X7cw6B4Y4X8oAFZ3dVWMh6nvMSP-2BODpvF4qlsKDzSsRY4vraVw5Fi-2FrmKRuN5fAXzxeYAOrdSvAAqKEwMoespb3Oo68zirQJeJsC4BSi-2BuCdM0Xb0bGWdCfljj6w-3D-3D/T_Re)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Time is almost up.
body:
Let's make history and elect Marc Flores as the first Latino to represent Texas's 18th Congressional District.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9kUuVBiDnac&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1f6964c98c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1f6964c98c-32267927

Good Morning Peter,

Time is almost up! Early voting is taking place now until Friday. After, the next opportunity to vote will be Tuesday, March 3rd. We need everyone’s voice heard in this election, so get out and vote!

I have seen and experienced firsthand the issues our community is facing. We need a comprehensive reformation on immigration, gun reform, and policies that ensure all are treated equal. Vote for me and I will tackle these issues head on.

When Do I Vote?

Early voting has already begun so cast your vote today! You have until 7pm on Friday, February 28th to early vote.
If you can't early vote by Friday, you'll need to vote on Election Day Tuesday, March 3rd.
Why Should I Vote For You?
I know the issues our community faces and have a plan of action.
Read about it here (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1f6964c98c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1f6964c98c-32267927)

Where Can I Vote?
Find my early voting location (https://www.harrisvotes.com/EarlyVoting?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1f6964c98c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1f6964c98c-32267927)

clean_body: Let's make history and elect Marc Flores as the first Latino to represent Texas's 18th Congressional District. Good Morning Peter, Time is almost up! Early voting is taking place now until Friday. After, the next opportunity to vote will be Tuesday, March 3rd. We need everyone’s voice heard in this election, so get out and vote! I have seen and experienced firsthand the issues our community is facing. We need a comprehensive reformation on immigration, gun reform, and policies that ensure all are treated equal. Vote for me and I will tackle these issues head on. When Do I Vote? Early voting has already begun so cast your vote today! You have until 7pm on Friday, February 28th to early vote. If you can't early vote by Friday, you'll need to vote on Election Day Tuesday, March 3rd. Why Should I Vote For You? I know the issues our community faces and have a plan of action. Read about it here () Where Can I Vote? Find my early voting location () If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: Fox News just admitted:

body:
---
| | I'm asking from the bottom of my heart: [**_I know we have a historic chance to unseat Mitch McConnell and take back the entire Senate. But we can 't do it without winning Ben Ray's race. I'm asking you to rush $10 before his critical end-of-month deadline in 48 hours to elect Ben Ray, DEFEAT McConnell, and FLIP the Senate. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200227_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I've been in the Senate for a decade. The damage I've watched Mitch McConnell inflict in that time is unspeakable. \- I've watched him cover up Trump's ties to Russia \- I've witnessed his shameful assault on Medicare \- I've watched his relentless attacks on women's rights [**And now, I 'd love nothing more than to watch him lose his seat -- and his majority -- for what he's done.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200227_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I know this is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to defeat McConnell. Even _Fox News_ admits his favorability is historically low. But I also know Democrats can't win the Senate without winning Ben Ray's race. I need a progressive champion like him serving alongside me in the Senate. He needs 2,458 gifts before his critical end-of-month deadline in 48 hours. Can I count on your $10? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200227_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b68f/18e32a7f/4e371fb0/7b22296b/3254726282/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b68f/18e32a7f/4e371fb0/7b222968/3254726282/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

name: Dean Browning
subject: Here's the deal
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Here's the deal. Not only am I on the ballot, but I will be listed as the first choice of Republican primary candidates.
I am the most qualified and best equipped candidate in the field to defeat Rep. Susan Wild and serve the people of Lehigh Valley. The point is this election is mine to win.
But... I need your support. And now, with just weeks until the primary, I need your help more than ever. Can I count on you to donate $100 today?
An immediate contribution will put me in the driver seat for the coming weeks before the primary.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_s8Vc_IlE1JzLMUXs9KqacQwhXyBlEJRiB7lnQT8sfAitWXd8y3-gdwYkA5qvku0vb4MBq1DADv7zOwxOFn0v--7UQL_JKWQxEB_PE2lynwAg8MgESURaUUMvVFYOGy_ZrQIT0QXKXPluS-y8KJppk6FM55lIW-gjGtztbtgCz9plR1qattjDw==&c=h-vzuZoTzEoPLYLb9TuKxlbo814i3rHmPfbq_yA44wrpyln24Guq9Q==&ch=Rw-g9mLTI-foPjrVtjflurKz_qWg5F5vgMYnM7YNToY1dUfUWv7WaA==)
---
| There is no doubt in my mind that the people of Lehigh Valley will rally behind a rock-solid conservative candidate to oust Socialist Representative Susan Wild.
But first, we need to win the primary, and looking at a side-by-side comparison, I am the only real Republican who will stand for conservative values and who will be a staunch ally of President Donald J. Trump in his second term. Establishment politicians in the Washington Swamp habitually say one thing while doing another.
Lisa Scheller's first campaign mailer showed she would fit right in if elected.
What Lisa claims she supports, and the hard facts of what she has done are two very different things.
Trust me, actions speak much louder than words.
In 2014, Lisa voted to make Lehigh County a Sanctuary County for dangerous illegal immigrants. (Resolution 2014-36).
This vote prohibits Lehigh County from honoring detainer requests/arrest warrants from ICE unless there is a court order!
Regardless of how Lisa tries to spin things, this policy makes Lehigh County a sanctuary jurisdiction. Her policies have made it more difficult for ICE to do their job and would allow dangerous and illegal criminals to be set free BEFORE THEY CAN BE TAKEN INTO CUSTODY BY ICE.
Now that Lisa is running in a Republican primary, she says she wants to "eliminate sanctuary cities." Yet when "Sanctuary" Scheller was in office, she voted to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county.
We already have one Congresswoman in Washington who says one thing while doing another. Why would we want to replace her with someone who does the same thing? THIS IS WHY WE NEED A REAL CONSERVATIVE TO RUN AGAINST REP. SUSAN WILD!!! , I urge you to donate to my campaign today, so I can win the primary, defeat Susan Wild, and bring conservative values back to our district!!
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help us win on April 28, 2020! Keep fighting the good fight!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_s8Vc_IlE1JzLMUXs9KqacQwhXyBlEJRiB7lnQT8sfAitWXd8y3-gdwYkA5qvku0vb4MBq1DADv7zOwxOFn0v--7UQL_JKWQxEB_PE2lynwAg8MgESURaUUMvVFYOGy_ZrQIT0QXKXPluS-y8KJppk6FM55lIW-gjGtztbtgCz9plR1qattjDw==&c=h-vzuZoTzEoPLYLb9TuKxlbo814i3rHmPfbq_yA44wrpyln24Guq9Q==&ch=Rw-g9mLTI-foPjrVtjflurKz_qWg5F5vgMYnM7YNToY1dUfUWv7WaA==)
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you seen Lisa Scheller's commitment to making Lehigh County a sanctuary city? We need to put an end to fake Republicans and start supporting our President!
A donation of $100, of $50, or even just $25 will help me support President Donald J. Trump in Washington!

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Here's the deal. Not only am I on the ballot, but I will be listed as the first choice of Republican primary candidates. I am the most qualified and best equipped candidate in the field to defeat Rep. Susan Wild and serve the people of Lehigh Valley. The point is this election is mine to win. But... I need your support. And now, with just weeks until the primary, I need your help more than ever. Can I count on you to donate $100 today? An immediate contribution will put me in the driver seat for the coming weeks before the primary. | | | == | There is no doubt in my mind that the people of Lehigh Valley will rally behind a rock-solid conservative candidate to oust Socialist Representative Susan Wild. But first, we need to win the primary, and looking at a side-by-side comparison, I am the only real Republican who will stand for conservative values and who will be a staunch ally of President Donald J. Trump in his second term. Establishment politicians in the Washington Swamp habitually say one thing while doing another. Lisa Scheller's first campaign mailer showed she would fit right in if elected. What Lisa claims she supports, and the hard facts of what she has done are two very different things. Trust me, actions speak much louder than words. In 2014, Lisa voted to make Lehigh County a Sanctuary County for dangerous illegal immigrants. (Resolution 2014-36). This vote prohibits Lehigh County from honoring detainer requests/arrest warrants from ICE unless there is a court order! Regardless of how Lisa tries to spin things, this policy makes Lehigh County a sanctuary jurisdiction. Her policies have made it more difficult for ICE to do their job and would allow dangerous and illegal criminals to be set free BEFORE THEY CAN BE TAKEN INTO CUSTODY BY ICE. Now that Lisa is running in a Republican primary, she says she wants to "eliminate sanctuary cities." Yet when "Sanctuary" Scheller was in office, she voted to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county. We already have one Congresswoman in Washington who says one thing while doing another. Why would we want to replace her with someone who does the same thing? THIS IS WHY WE NEED A REAL CONSERVATIVE TO RUN AGAINST REP. SUSAN WILD!!! , I urge you to donate to my campaign today, so I can win the primary, defeat Susan Wild, and bring conservative values back to our district!! A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help us win on April 28, 2020! Keep fighting the good fight! | | | == | For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S. ~ Have you seen Lisa Scheller's commitment to making Lehigh County a sanctuary city? We need to put an end to fake Republicans and start supporting our President! A donation of $100, of $50, or even just $25 will help me support President Donald J. Trump in Washington! | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. Congress Street, Allentown, PA 18104 | | Sent by mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com in collaboration with |

As the Democratic Party continues to embrace a socialist agenda, our country’s future hangs in the balance. The liberals want to rip the American system apart and bring socialism out of the trash heap of history - I can tell you now they are dead wrong. Every American generation before us had to fight the creep of socialism - now it’s time for us to make our stand. subject: RE: What's coming

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?refcode=022720) | | Friend, I want to make sure you saw Senator Smith's email yesterday. She is a fantastic United States Senator and a terrific friend and ally of the House DFL. Would you consider pitching in to our grassroots movement today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=022720) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=022720) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=022720) [**Other Amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=022720) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Thank you for continued support. It takes all of us to make this movement happen, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives \--------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Tina Smith** <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Wed, Feb 26, 2020, 7:13 PM Subject: What's coming Friend, When I was Lieutenant Governor of Minnesota I worked closely with the legislature to bring to life a vision of Minnesota that works better for everyone. After working with a legislature controlled by Republicans, I can't tell you what it means to see Speaker Hortman and the House DFL Majority move the needle on some of the most important issues facing our state. **Now I 've worked with DFLers in the Minnesota House and I've met many of the candidates running and I can tell you this: They know what it takes to put in the work to get the job done for their communities.** I am excited to be on the ballot with them this year. You see, House DFLers are key to our grassroots support and strengthen our entire ticket. That's why I'm coming to you today. **Will you chip in $25 today to help the House DFL not just protect but grow their majority in 2020?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **[Chip in $25->](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihmXPPe2roOidYvSpHAEnvfTWo6A0onwskzonIfPJec=/DUH9gop3q0WUuU3Asr4-8ryw8yM9FF-c2rN3YICem1k=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=022720)** We know what is coming and we need your help. **Trump came within striking distance of turning Minnesota red and he 's already made Minnesota a top target for 2020.** From common-sense gun violence prevention to affordable and accessible health care to solidifying the protection of reproductive rights, there is so much on the line this year. With so much at stake, we need the House DFL Majority now more than ever. Thank you, Senator Tina Smith **_[P.S. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Says Coronavirus Response is Working, Taps Pence to Lead Fight
body:
"President Trump told Americans not to panic over the coronavirus Wednesday, saying he’s taken the reins." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df938f5e0f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Says Coronavirus Response is Working, Taps Pence to Lead Fight**

“President Trump told Americans not to panic over the coronavirus Wednesday, saying he’s taken the reins, U.S. patients are recovering, and his decision to defy critics and restrict travel from China is working,” Tom Howell Jr. reports for _The Washington Times_.

“It turned out to be a very good thing,” the President said. “Because of all we’ve done the risk to the American people remains very low.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b5c6ad2ac&e=3ee4985eea)

**Learn more:** [Immediate risk is low, but it’s important to stay prepared.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89d99f6d8a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Addressing more than 100,000 people in a packed Ahmedabad stadium [in India this week], Trump offered a bright vision of future friendship between the world's most powerful and its most populous democracies. As the BBC observed, ‘It was a good speech,’” the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab44ac33ea&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “A federal appeals court on Wednesday handed a major win to the Trump administration in its fight against ‘sanctuary’ jurisdictions, ruling that it can deny grant money to states that refuse to cooperate with federal immigration authorities,” Adam Shaw and Bill Mears report for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9492dac867&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Under President Trump, the United States led the world in reducing carbon-dioxide emissions in 2019.” But independent data showing that U.S. emissions dropped by 2.9 percent last year “failed to make an impression with Democrats, environmentalists and climate activists, who either shrugged off the data or argued that Mr. Trump’s climate-denialism was somehow thwarted,” Valerie Richardson writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eefb60ef94&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2020/feb/25/donald-trump-denied-credit-us-emissions-decline/").
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec8473b4f1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed485c709d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e4ed8aadb9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Before our fundraising deadline this Saturday, I wanted to take a moment to explain why your donations are so important — especially today. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15493027/163543105/664205141?refcode=em022720-3-header&refcode2=4e116e15-ab59-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTExNmUxNS1hYjU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jU1RB7USD3swhhrc7DeeWSz6wELkAoMpZpFAdoRmT7A=) **** | | Friend —

Before our fundraising deadline this Saturday, I wanted to take a moment to explain why your donations are so important — especially today.

The first thing you need to know is that I don’t take money from corporate PACs. I’m counting on the people of Georgia and others across the country to support my candidacy because I’m sick of the influence dark money has over our elections, and I’m willing to bet most Georgians – and most Americans – are too.

I’m proud to say we’ve received donations from all 50 states and most of Georgia’s 159 counties. These donations have been vital as we build this campaign to defeat Donald Trump’s right-hand man in the Senate, David Perdue.

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Blue Wave Van Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
Early voting is underway, the Primary on March 3rd is right around the corner, and we are having an amazing run with my **Blue Wave Van Tour!** From Charlotte to Asheville to Greensboro to Raleigh to Bertie to Fayetteville to Goldsboro to a city or town near you, I am driving to the finish line to become your next United States Senator from North Carolina!

Our team is excited in meeting and engaging with so many supporters and voters (and future voters) across the state in face-to-face conversations. I am listening to everyday North Carolinians tell me about the issues that matter to them, supporting other Democratic candidates, taking some photos, and earning your vote. There is a ground-swell of support, energy, and excitement building in this historic election. We have been warmly welcomed by the communities and our volunteers and, for that, we are humbled and very appreciative!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ZL6CvsVVWC73zEeyxPINbctTJN-6wLuWsXLUD_61NQ=/jCpTkN9o9GvRHJ_l9dS0DKVBXGk7hcgqr8VWOPs-Oiw=)

For the continued success of my Blue Wave Van Tour and Get Out The Vote campaign here at crunch time, I need your support and contributions. I am **In It To Win It** and every amount is appreciated! Remember to vote early by February 29th and encourage others to do the same! **Please contribute today. **

**I am One of Us for ALL of US!**
#EricaForUS

www.ericaforus.com

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ZL6CvsVVWC73zEeyxPINbctTJN-6wLuWsXLUD_61NQ=/C6FEsU3OC2rU-p_T6fWcQDGep5f_Aa1MpDR90ht_Uzw=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}

name: Progressive Majority
subject: The damage Trump can inflict in just three weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- since Trump's acquittal in the Senate three weeks ago, he's:
* Fired Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman and Amb. Sondland for testifying truthfully against him.
* Directed Attorney General Barr to intervene in Roger Stone's sentencing, leading more than 2,000 former DOJ officials to demand Barr resign.
* Fired the acting Director of National Intelligence for warning us that Russia is once again interfering in our elections \-- and replaced him with a loyalist who has no intelligence experience.

But according to a recent Emerson poll, 8% of Democrats say they won't vote against Trump if their top Democratic candidate doesn't win the primary. And another 13% say it depends on which candidate wins. If more than 20% of Democrats stay home in November, Trump WILL be re-elected without a check on his presidency. We need to know: | | **Will you vote in November to defeat Donald Trump?**
[ Yes
No](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c44/5360b1c8/2d4e7cc1/b071f10/3236460529/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/IjsRzV2a") |

Progressive Majority

name: Mike Thompson
subject: tell the senate to stop dragging their feet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iHyAPFlenuXOdVABTQjJFtcOOgC5V5fRencYegv-9uY=/ARs35U74aVi88b0RT0wR7N4UlA2VI-i_w0exIC1upwU=?refcode=MT_EM_PT_200227&amount=10&amount=25&recurring=1) Peter,

One year ago today, the House passed H.R. 8, a bipartisan bill I introduced to require a background check on every firearm sale.

Everyday since H.R. 8 passed the House, I have fought for the Senate to take action and **_finally_** pass this bill that will save lives. Yet, we still wait. Not only does today mark one year since the House passed H.R. 8, it also marks a year that Leader McConnell has been dragging his feet on passing this commonsense legislation. ****[Add your name to tell McConnell to pass H.R. 8](https://act.myngp.com/el/iHyAPFlenuXOdVABTQjJFtcOOgC5V5fRencYegv-9uY=/zPla2e0k-37OG-hluG3vsDSjVx0E8cHA1ogYHpSks9o=)**** With your help, I know the Senate will have no choice but to pass H.R. 8. Their thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need action now!
[**_Stand with me to demand McConnell pass H.R. 8._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iHyAPFlenuXOdVABTQjJFtcOOgC5V5fRencYegv-9uY=/zPla2e0k-37OG-hluG3vsDSjVx0E8cHA1ogYHpSks9o=)

Thank you for your support,

Mike Thompson

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: I'm reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to support our campaign. I promise, there's a very good reason why:
body:
In just a few days, our team will close the books on February fundraising.

Friends,
I'm reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to support our campaign. I promise, there's a very good reason why:
In just a few days, our team will close the books on February fundraising. That's important because hitting our monthly fundraising goals is how we stay on track to report a really great number when our FEC report goes public at the end of this quarter (and how we outraise Susan Collins _again_!).
So here's the part where I ask:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month deadline hits this Saturday at midnight? I wouldn't ask if it weren't truly important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a8/4bef7a87/6def0cfa/287fae8f/1929383180/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-feb20-deadline?refcode=em200227-1-full")**
Remember, ours is one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Susan Collins' approval ratings are lower than ever, and a recent poll shows Sara Gideon leading by one point!
**That means every quarter between now and Election Day, our fundraising numbers are going to be put under a microscope.**
We can't afford to fall short of our goals -- _not even once._
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a8/4bef7a87/6def0cfa/287fae8f/1929383180/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-feb20-deadline?refcode=em200227-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a8/4bef7a87/6def0cfa/287fae8e/1929383180/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a8/4bef7a87/6def0cfa/287fae8d/1929383180/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a8/4bef7a87/6def0cfa/287fae8c/1929383180/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I am quitting...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJ0NEj28CFRbeFf8fpwKllxu9DpfxeL6ELgZFvHxG1c5fG75tYaNRmvr6gcpQenLUPQaCBiWBqLTnAiVmU9cvfjrtamArR3Zsx4GDMgXq_8gCut6LRTcR8ssY3X7WZpcanpQbWBPYNMpJxcVgBk8uajdUzyor1Y6&c=_kxB202AbeaNAzCIYlw7cjn358tTzWYjy6YSCM_8So6_r1QCH4u0tw==&ch=33C2hn9pV6Bt3UDDHdpMhYx7LMu-TYKs0vQje6wR_HtvsPFD57o57g==)
---
| Patriots -
Today I announced that I will no longer take money from federal PACs - the deepest swamp in Washington.
I am the ONLY returning Republican to make this pledge. For too long, federal PACs have had a stranglehold over our government and too many "conservatives" are nothing more than mouthpieces for special interest groups. Polluters should not set environmental standards. Insurance companies shouldn't get special rules to cheat policyholders. Big Tech should not be allowed to define debate in our country as they buy off Congress - but they do.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJ0NEj28CFRbeFf8fpwKllxu9DpfxeL6ELgZFvHxG1c5fG75tYaNRmvr6gcpQenLUPQaCBiWBqLTnAiVmU9cvfjrtamArR3Zsx4GDMgXq_8gCut6LRTcR8ssY3X7WZpcanpQbWBPYNMpJxcVgBk8uajdUzyor1Y6&c=_kxB202AbeaNAzCIYlw7cjn358tTzWYjy6YSCM_8So6_r1QCH4u0tw==&ch=33C2hn9pV6Bt3UDDHdpMhYx7LMu-TYKs0vQje6wR_HtvsPFD57o57g==)
---
| Go beyond the hype of the moment and fight to defeat the swamp monsters that auction off your freedoms and seek to rob you of your liberty.
From this point forward, I will be funded only by Patriots like you! I am going to need your help to take on the special interests and PACs that will surely want to take me out.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJ0NEj28CFRbeFf8fpwKllxu9DpfxeL6ELgZFvHxG1c5fG75tYaNRmvr6gcpQenLUPQaCBiWBqLTnAiVmU9cvfjrtamArR3Zsx4GDMgXq_8gCut6LRTcR8ssY3X7WZpcanpQbWBPYNMpJxcVgBk8uajdUzyor1Y6&c=_kxB202AbeaNAzCIYlw7cjn358tTzWYjy6YSCM_8So6_r1QCH4u0tw==&ch=33C2hn9pV6Bt3UDDHdpMhYx7LMu-TYKs0vQje6wR_HtvsPFD57o57g==)
---
| I am not afraid to speak truth to power, but I need you by my side. Donate now to take on the Swamp and help me drain it.
---
| | | [CHIP IN TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJ0NEj28CFRbeFf8fpwKllxu9DpfxeL6ELgZFvHxG1c5fG75tYaNRmvr6gcpQenLUPQaCBiWBqLTnAiVmU9cvfjrtamArR3Zsx4GDMgXq_8gCut6LRTcR8ssY3X7WZpcanpQbWBPYNMpJxcVgBk8uajdUzyor1Y6&c=_kxB202AbeaNAzCIYlw7cjn358tTzWYjy6YSCM_8So6_r1QCH4u0tw==&ch=33C2hn9pV6Bt3UDDHdpMhYx7LMu-TYKs0vQje6wR_HtvsPFD57o57g==)

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE 2/27/2020 Contact: benjaminwoods@hightopconsulting.com **Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal Endorses Monika Johnson-Hostler for Congress** Raleigh, NC: Monika Johnson- Hostler is excited to announce that she has the backing of Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal (D-WA) in her bid for North Carolina's new 2nd Congressional district. "It is an honor to receive the support of a fierce advocate for working families and people of all backgrounds." Hostler says. Speaking of the endorsement, Jayapal says that "Monika has spent her career advocating and fighting for others and I know she will do the same in Congress. She is fighting to expand healthcare coverage for everyone, save our planet, and reform our criminal justice system. I am proud to support her campaign and know her experience and passion have prepared her well to be a strong leader in Congress." This endorsement is a tremendous boost in the closing days of this campaign and shows the strength of Monika's candidacy in having the endorsement of the Co-Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. [Monika is the only proven progressive in this race and would be the first African American woman elected in this district, and only the third African American woman in North Carolina history to be sent to Congress.
