name: Team Kathy
subject: Watch Primary Election Results with Team Kathy!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATHY MANNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

We are quickly approaching Election Day and Team Kathy couldn't be more excited to usher in a new and strong voice for the Triad!

Yesterday our team knocked on hundreds of doors and I am proud to report that voters are excited and all in for Kathy.

Those voters made a plan to vote, they promised to share our campaign literature with neighbors who weren't home and three even signed up to phonebank!

We need to keep up the momentum going into Election Day.

Join us tomorrow for an Evening Reception in support of Kathy Manning. May Gayle & Paul Mengert have graciously agreed to open up their home for us and Kathy wants to see you there.

Please RSVP today!

Sean Grier

Finance Director

336-268-6711

Please Join

May Gayle & Paul Mengert

Jill Wilson & Marc Isaacson

for an Evening Reception in support of

Kathy Manning

Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives (NC-6)

Host Committee in formation*

Tuesday, February 25, 2020

5:30 pm - 7:30 pm

Greensboro, NC 27410

Host: $1,000

*per person

name: Charles Booker
subject: Asking you for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Kentuckians don’t want to just uphold the status quo. We want change.
#
We emailed earlier that we’re still a little more than $18k away from our fundraising goal with the time ticking down to our end-of-month deadline.
[**Can you help me push a little more towards that goal with a $5 gift? It couldn’t be more important if we’re going to defeat Mitch McConnell.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15496383/163578748/-226668764?refcode=em20200227-pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczYTI1OC1iYTU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hbg0_Hc6v65i6--zMU4UTRiVQNs5AyedCYHawHCb9E8=)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15496384/163578749/-226668764?refcode=em20200227-pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczYTI1OC1iYTU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hbg0_Hc6v65i6--zMU4UTRiVQNs5AyedCYHawHCb9E8=)**
Pundits and politicians are going to look at how much money we raise as a sign of our strength heading into the Democratic Primary. It’s important to show that a progressive campaign against Mitch McConnell has the grassroots enthusiasm we need to boost voter turnout and flip the Senate in 2020.
Whether or not we raise enough money to be competitive is going to impact how the press covers us, and whether or not Kentuckians feel like this movement is growing and they should join us.
The Democratic Party establishment and the DSCC made it very clear earlier this month that they do not think a progressive can win in Kentucky. That’s why they threw all their support behind my opponent.
But Kentuckians don’t want to just uphold the status quo. We want change. And WE can be that change, but only if we harness enough momentum to allow this movement to take off. That starts with meeting our big goals this month.
[**Please make a $5 contribution before our end-of-month deadline. Together, we can show a progressive vision will win Kentucky.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15496385/163578750/-226668764?refcode=em20200227-pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczYTI1OC1iYTU5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hbg0_Hc6v65i6--zMU4UTRiVQNs5AyedCYHawHCb9E8=)
It’s truly an honor to be in this movement with you all.
\- Charles

clean_body: Kentuckians don’t want to just uphold the status quo. We want change. We emailed earlier that we’re still a little more than $18k away from our fundraising goal with the time ticking down to our end-of-month deadline. = = Pundits and politicians are going to look at how much money we raise as a sign of our strength heading into the Democratic Primary. It’s important to show that a progressive campaign against Mitch McConnell has the grassroots enthusiasm we need to boost voter turnout and flip the Senate in 2020. Whether or not we raise enough money to be competitive is going to impact how the press covers us, and whether or not Kentuckians feel like this movement is growing and they should join us. The Democratic Party establishment and the DSCC made it very clear earlier this month that they do not think a progressive can win in Kentucky. That’s why they threw all their support behind my opponent. But Kentuckians don’t want to just uphold the status quo. We want change. And WE can be that change, but only if we harness enough momentum to allow this movement to take off. That starts with meeting our big goals this month. = It’s truly an honor to be in this movement with you all. \- Charles = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- Washington is a lousy place to get things done, but now is the wrong time to walk away from the fight of our lives. We need to defeat Trump. We need to take back the Senate. The paths to accomplishing both run right through Colorado, especially now that our campaign is considered the Democrats' best chance to flip a Senate seat. But the truth is, we have some challenges ahead: Trump is promising to campaign "a lot" in Colorado this year, and he already came right after Gardner voted to acquit him. Plus, they have an army of right-wing billionaires who will spend outrageous amounts of money to launch false attacks against me. We won't stoop down to their level and launch false attacks, but we need the resources to fight back and get our message out. Your voice in this fight will be the great equalizer in this election, and with our February fundraising deadline in two days, I need to ask one more time: **Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or more before our end-of-month deadline on Saturday? We 're so close to reaching our critical $500,000 goal. I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200227-lousy?refcode=em-200227-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: quick update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Sent from iPhone | |
---
| | | Friend,

I'm on the road today in Paola, Garnett, Mound City, and Louisburg, but I wanted to make sure you got a quick update from us! We've hit every corner of the district and _**I've attached some photos below.**_

We've hit the ground running in 2020 and we're building a lot of momentum. If you want to stay up to date on where we are, or where we are headed next, follow us on [Facebook](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=763b24db06&e=1050d051da).

In the past few weeks we've been to **Blue Rapids, Seneca, Sabetha, Holton, Oskaloosa, Topeka, Basehor, Tonganoxie, Lansing, Leavenworth, Baldwin City, Eudora, Lawrence, Lecompton, Pittsburg, Columbus, Burlington, Osage City, Ottawa, Parsons, Coffeyville, Mound Valley, Cherryvale, Independence, Troy, Highland, and Hiawatha. **

[Would you consider contributing to help put gas in our tank?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1e760c2d3d&e=1050d051da)
---
| Having the opportunity to hear the concerns and questions of Kansans across the district is one of the best parts of campaigning. It's what drives us to get out on the road and travel from one place to the next.
---
| We enjoyed some great conversations with folks throughout the 2nd District and we look forward to even more!

Yours in the fight,

clean_body: Sent from iPhone | | | | | Friend, I'm on the road today in Paola, Garnett, Mound City, and Louisburg, but I wanted to make sure you got a quick update from us! We've hit every corner of the district and I've attached some photos below. We've hit the ground running in 2020 and we're building a lot of momentum. If you want to stay up to date on where we are, or where we are headed next, follow us on . In the past few weeks we've been to Blue Rapids, Seneca, Sabetha, Holton, Oskaloosa, Topeka, Basehor, Tonganoxie, Lansing, Leavenworth, Baldwin City, Eudora, Lawrence, Lecompton, Pittsburg, Columbus, Burlington, Osage City, Ottawa, Parsons, Coffeyville, Mound Valley, Cherryvale, Independence, Troy, Highland, and Hiawatha. | Having the opportunity to hear the concerns and questions of Kansans across the district is one of the best parts of campaigning. It's what drives us to get out on the road and travel from one place to the next. | We enjoyed some great conversations with folks throughout the 2nd District and we look forward to even more! Bernie’s statements were such an insult to every Cuban-American that fled Castro’s totalitarian regime that Maria felt it was her duty to respond to Bernie’s complete ignorance!

**Here’s a breakdown of Maria’s response to Bernie Sanders:**

**First,** she schooled him on a much-needed history lesson on the actual brutality of the Cuban Revolution and of the Castro Regime.

**Then,** she explained to him that Fidel Castro was not just an authoritarian, he was a totalitarian that dominated and controlled the lives of Cubans.

**Lastly,** she warned Americans that Bernie’s pro-socialist and anti-US rhetoric is very similar to the language that Fidel Castro used to say about the United States.

However, Maria said it best when she said:

_**“I don’t see anybody getting on a raft from Miami, past sharks, to get to Havana. It’s the other way around, it’s the other way around and worst of all Mr. Sanders you know it!”**_

name: NH Trump Co-Chair Lou Gargiulo
subject: Derek did you see this?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MzkyMzc4MDk3MDQ2ODkwJmM9dzlmMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMzMDMzODImZD1xMWo5czN6.HKH_P0Z3ZLePJjoBXOWAdc5AR3ZkBUPo8MnRtMT0aWU)
| | |
---
| Derek, The UNH poll released today tells us something I am already seeing on the ground: We have the momentum. **President Trump is statistically tied in New Hampshire face-to-face matchups with Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Pete Buttigieg, while he is dominating a face-to-face matchup with Michael Bloomberg.**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MzkyMzc4MDk3MDQ2ODkwJmM9dzlmMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMzMDMzODgmZD1uMnI4YTBh.BwNuZ2_kes6-Noacp-8_AaT2_ZLltAZFK7Z82q1xO6U)
---
| |
---
| New Hampshire was the first state this cycle with Trump Victory staff, and the results are showing. This is one of the President's strongest New Hampshire polls to date and it shows how the momentum is on our side - we've closed the gap and are now tied or beating our likely Democrat opponent. After an incredible turnout of support for our President in the First-in-the-Nation Primary, we are confident we can build the infrastructure needed to deliver New Hampshire for President Trump in November. With this UNH poll showing a dead heat, [will you join me today in supporting the NHGOP in their efforts to deliver President Trump four electoral votes from NH?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MzkyMzc4MDk3MDQ2ODkwJmM9dzlmMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMzMDMzOTAmZD1tNWQ2aDB3.F8swZBDd2ZFsA-aPwdD_mNVjut86aE_I7_lmGJaKfN8) It is clear to me that NH will reject the socialist policies of the Democratic Party in favor of four more years of a strong economy. Any amount, no matter how big or small, is going to go directly towards taking on the Democrats. [Will you contribute $20, $25, $50, $100, or your most generous contribution today to help us push the President over the top in NH?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MzkyMzc4MDk3MDQ2ODkwJmM9dzlmMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMzMDMzOTImZD1sNXA0ZjBr.zVudpbZ7EvUxjNT69srho4KmcgpgMwraVuax79xtStc) Thank you, Lou Gargiulo
NH Trump Co-Chair PS: Bernie Sanders wants nothing more than to win his neighboring state, we need to push back against the socialist policies from Senator Sanders. [Contribute today.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY1MzkyMzc4MDk3MDQ2ODkwJmM9dzlmMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjMzMDMzOTYmZD15NnU5aTJh._aUgpiRmikKld5Y-eJYfi_eYEGgmYAdJSUrXfqZySh8)

In Washington, our conservative principles are under attack and I need the support of grassroots conservatives to help defend our values. Team,

We're 5 days out from the March 3rd primary, and we've got a lot of doors to knock before then, voters to reach, and ads to get up on the air.

Sri knows the power of democracy comes from the strength of our communities. Now is the time to use that strength. He's not holding back and neither should we.
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20200227)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200227)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200227)** **[Chip in: $150](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=20200227)** **[Chip in: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=20200227)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200227)** Thank you for your support,

Rocky Saligram
Political Director

**\---Original Message---**

Team,

We're less than a week out from the primary, and every single hour in these final days counts as March 3rd approaches!

We need to make sure we're giving the primary all we've got to avoid a runoff so we can truly focus our resources on flipping this seat in November.

**[But we still need to raise another $8500 online before the 29th to hit our goal. Would you consider making a contribution of any size, friend, to ensure we have the resources we need to win?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?refcode=20200227&amount=25&recurring=1)**

We know that Sri's got what it takes to lead, and according to our latest endorsement from the _Houston Chronicle_ , he's got what it takes to win _and_ to flip this seat!

Sri grew up here, he experienced and knows the challenges that our communities are facing today: flooding, gun violence, a broken criminal justice system, and unequal access to education.

And everyone on Team Sri is fighting to make sure that he can use his experience to push for progress for Texans.

**[Team, you may know that Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows we deserve a representative who serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests, so we need your support to win this primary.](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?refcode=20200227&amount=25&recurring=1)**

This campaign will continue to center our communities, work to be more inclusive, and fight for all voters to be heard.

We hope you'll continue to fight with us,

Allen Chen
Campaign Manager | **** | ****[CHIP IN ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmwFVk15Q7YLT2Vv2e1Mwdl1Lc0e0VZOeDfOI9af-ek=/XaGsJ_fZpQv6Y9YNFY2mAspQiSdbvjxuKHk5TxE16-I=?refcode=20200227&amount=25&recurring=1)****

body:

| | **_ CNN POLLING UPDATE:_
**Six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term****
---
Team, we haven't heard from you:
**Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**

Team: From the first MINUTE of his presidency, Trump has spewed racism, cozied up to dictators and fired anyone who disagrees with him. **He 's the third President in our nation's history to be impeached by the House. Despite all this, Trump still thinks he should get to keep damaging our country for FOUR MORE YEARS.**
**The American people know better:** CNN released a poll saying six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term - but we haven't heard from you.
If this can be confirmed, it would be HUGE for Democrats, so we're conducting our own Trump Approval poll. **But we 're still 21 responses short in 34223 to reach statistical significance, and the poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight.**** Will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight?:**
| | **Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**

clean_body: | | | | | CNN POLLING UPDATE: Six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term** Team, we haven't heard from you: Does Donald Trump deserve a second term? | | | | Team: From the first MINUTE of his presidency, Trump has spewed racism, cozied up to dictators and fired anyone who disagrees with him. He 's the third President in our nation's history to be impeached by the House. Despite all this, Trump still thinks he should get to keep damaging our country for FOUR MORE YEARS. The American people know better: CNN released a poll saying six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term - but we haven't heard from you. If this can be confirmed, it would be HUGE for Democrats, so we're conducting our own Trump Approval poll. But we 're still 21 responses short in 34223 to reach statistical significance, and the poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight.** Will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight?: | | Does Donald Trump deserve a second term? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Eric Hyers
subject: [Join the Team] Help us defeat Mitch McConnell in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America Fund, [www
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f134/487452203/VEsH/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fmsa_monthly_template?refcode=fmsa_headerlogo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")

| | Make no mistake, electing Democrats in Kentucky is not easy. But I know how to get it done. Make no mistake, electing Democrats in Kentucky is not easy. **But I know how to get it done.** I served as campaign manager for Democrat Andy Beshear -- who defeated Kentucky's Republican governor Matt Bevin in a historic upset that shocked the political world last November. And we did it by putting in the work to organize locally and _effectively_ , identifying swing-regions and knocking on more than a million doors to get our message out to every voter. **We showed that even in deep-red states like Kentucky, voters expect their leaders to fight for them, not the powerful special interests who are threatening our democracy.** Now, I'm turning my focus to the SINGLE thing that would make Kentucky -- and America -- better for all:**Helping Democrat Amy McGrath defeat Mitch McConnell in 2020.** **And friends, that 's where you come in.** **[Will you add your name to become a founding member of Fire Mitch, Save America -- the only Super PAC dedicated exclusively to helping Democratic challenger Amy McGrath unseat Mitch in 2020?](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f135/487452203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/s/FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboardA_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+become+a+found&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")** | | | [Join the Team >>](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f136/487452203/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/s/FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboardA_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=3+-+Join+the+Team+gtgt&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")
---
Mitch McConnell is the single BIGGEST obstacle to getting our country back on track -- and he's never been more vulnerable.
**Our team knows how to win state-wide in Kentucky.** We can beat him at the ballot box, but we need all hands on deck to make it happen!
**For the sake of our country 's future, we must defeat him for good -- and Amy McGrath is our best shot to get it done.** **[Will you sign on to become a founding member of the team that's going to Fire Mitch and Save America in 2020?](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f137/487452203/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/s/FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboardA_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+sign+on+to+become+a+founding+me&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")**
| | [I'm in!](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f128/487452203/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/s/FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboardA_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=5+-+Im+in&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")
---
We've got the knowledge to hit the ground running, but we need people like you on our side to make sure we've got the numbers to go up against Mitch and the special interests backing him.
Thanks for your support,
Eric
_Eric Hyers
Fire Mitch, Save America_

| [ ](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d6a/71661046/4dc7aec/1933f129/487452203/VEsA/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "http://firemitchsaveamerica.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=6+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3&source=FIR_EM_EN_200227_HyersOnboard_U1_X3")

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200227-eom12?refcode=em200227-eom12&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Donald Trump Jr. is raising money for our opponent, Jason Lewis, at a closed-door Washington fundraiser at the Trump Hotel -- **TODAY.**

This fundraiser is only the beginning of an onslaught of GOP attacks and rallies to fire up Trump's right-wing base. In fact, that's exactly why Mike Pence is coming to town next week! And you can bet he's got his sights set on defeating Tina.

Look, we know Trump and his allies will do whatever they need to flip Minnesota red, which means we can't afford to take anything for granted. Not for a second.

That's why we're coming to you for immediate help:

body:
| | | Your mission, should you choose to accept it, is simple:
1. Fix what Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have broken.
2. Create a path to a better future for every person who calls America home.
3. And never, _ever_ give up the fight.

How do we get there? Well, as Senator Merkley said yesterday, we build a grassroots movement. We're well on our way, with over 3,700 donations this month already. _Just a few hundred left to go!_ [**Will you accept the mission and chip in $3 before the end of the month?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869160/4229928345/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **_Molly McGuire_**
** _Team Merkley_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869161/4229928345/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-02-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/1586919f/4229928345/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-02-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/1586919c/4229928345/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/1586919a/4229928345/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---
Forwarded Message

February may be the short month, but there's sure a lot going on.
My focus? Securing Oregon's Senate seat and preparing to help my fellow Democratic Senate candidates win in challenging races all across America.
Imagine what we can do after we win back the Senate and the White House!
We can finally make progress tackling climate chaos. We can develop a comprehensive immigration policy founded on treating all humans with decency. We can take action to reduce gun violence in our schools and communities. We can restore integrity to the White House. And we can end corruption and put power back in the hands of the people.
But to do that, we'll have to build the most powerful grassroots campaign in the history of this country. We're on our way, but we can't let up now.
[**My goal: Take Back the Senate and get America back on track. Let's get to 4000 grassroots donations before the end of the month to help make it happen. Donate today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869160/4229928345/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
I am running for re-election because we can _never_ give up this fight, because I think the future of our country and planet are _worth fighting for_.
**And it's why I'm asking for you to**[**join our grassroots movement**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869160/4229928345/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")**[.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869198/4229928345/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-26-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Because I believe with all of my heart that a committed group of people ****_can_****change the world.**
Your grassroots contributions are our movement's fuel. Together, we can do this.
[**Chip in before the end of the month. Let's win this together.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f30b/6cd27893/53ccc07c/15869160/4229928345/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
_Jeff_

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b68d/18e32a7f/4e39d3cc/7b222bfb/2177014875/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. subject: TONIGHT: President Trump honors African American History Month
body:
This evening, President Trump will speak at a White House reception honoring African American History Month. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dec480afe3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **TONIGHT: President Trump honors African American History Month**

**This evening,** President Trump will speak at a White House reception honoring African American History Month—a celebration that coincides this year with the 150th anniversary of the 15th Amendment.

**The 15th Amendment** gave African-American men the right to vote. Ratified in 1870, it prohibits the government from denying or abridging suffrage based on “race, color, or previous condition of servitude.”

[🎥 WATCH LIVE at 6 p.m. ET: President and First Lady attend reception](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=736622b64f&e=3ee4985eea)

**African Americans** have enhanced—and advanced—every aspect of American life. “Their fight for equality, representation, and respect motivates us to continue working for a more promising, peaceful, and hopeful future for every American,” President Trump wrote in his 2020 National African American History Month [Proclamation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e975183c72&e=3ee4985eea).

**Great strides** are being made today to expand the American Dream for every citizen, no matter their race or background. The blue-collar, working-class economic boom under President Trump is lifting communities that Washington neglected for too long:
* The African-American unemployment rate hit an _all-time low_ in 2019.

* African-American poverty has fallen to the lowest rate ever recorded.

* Historic criminal justice reform, signed by President Trump, reformed Clinton-era sentencing laws that disproportionately harmed African Americans. Now, [Second Chance Hiring](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75cd06ba89&e=3ee4985eea) is giving these citizens a path to rewarding careers.

**Patriotism means** fighting for every American. “Our great Nation is strengthened and enriched by citizens of every race, religion, color, and creed,” President Trump says.

[“The Trump Economy Benefits Historically-Disadvantaged Americans”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a44499d027&e=3ee4985eea)

**🍿****Watch:** [First Lady hosts movie night celebrating African-American History Month ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=728da4df4f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: First Lady visits school in New Delhi**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90d76b76b7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **While visiting India** with President Trump earlier this week, First Lady Melania Trump dropped by a local school that teaches a “happiness curriculum” to its young students. That mission is close to the First Lady’s heart—her [Be Best initiative](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c498c568a0&e=3ee4985eea) focuses on helping children in all aspects of their social, emotional, and physical well-being.

**“Unforgettable afternoon** at the Sarvodaya School in New Delhi! It was an honor to be surrounded by extraordinary students and faculty. Thank you for the warm welcome! #BeBest,” she wrote on Twitter.

[“First Lady Melania Trump visits 'happiness' class at Delhi school”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=faa8ce0471&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, joined by Vice President Pence and members of the Coronavirus Task Force, speaks to members of the press** | February 26, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16ebe869b1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bff83b86f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1da5454861)
---

Be proud to say you didn't stay home in this election

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6dc87a85cb9d4f1c9e96c20e06b9045c&_e=D2jjC1TpywPJdE2tPMUCGSCR4hWEdRD2fC-gUAf0iqA5LmYW3hORm797NNQRCBAvKkgQIAEp9oR9miiIXVOAjCFPVmHPoCCQzABygUmRoR5SrbyXkawCXKcUwa5sJTyFuaOHG882GK-hE6C3lhdM27KBTBRplu_LPAShY8UE62wRZplWVRx0n4dHpcIrbaEjX85VgVj8SNVKSioNZn4KkW1tGWVT_FNVQ8y82s_SL5B_DikG_o1-jnP3eAcZSpBoi43Nb0Ua9fCemq8cD6cpCAiP7r6vcItfdyoiOGQrVSjZUnxYVKRKnEiKa3lAl99NOYp3xCO-b8yS0NWfv9yDhgroOFlClueW9c1YZxcgdtJzOpks5b4YQ5eil-QMOnMqwcj2UpzeYNDgJm_Qpf2qzA%3D%3D) Friend -- This campaign is about to face our greatest test -- and our biggest opportunity. Super Tuesday, March 3, is the day when the most pledged delegates in the race are awarded. I can't overstate how big a deal this is, and we need all hands on deck this Saturday, one of our last big organizing days before votes are counted. [**Can you join fellow supporters on Saturday in PA to get the job done? Find an event near you.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6dc87a85cb9d4f1c9e96c20e06b9045c&_e=D2jjC1TpywPJdE2tPMUCGSCR4hWEdRD2fC-gUAf0iqA5LmYW3hORm797NNQRCBAvKkgQIAEp9oR9miiIXVOAjCFPVmHPoCCQzABygUmRoR5SrbyXkawCXKcUwa5sJTyFuaOHG882GK-hE6C3lhdM27KBTBRplu_LPAShY8UE62wRZplWVRx0n4dHpcIrbaEjvmkGWpYaDB0ATgWqLviBkksNbpbtxFrSu39DvR_vcnISvY_NK0G74FIf0vu9hSagE0ThPAvsEVGYuPlpBx6mpIWcCb5FbQJfBeTKizOHcSiPt8XG6RIv_V2LypWP9e-il87YJ5XFWQhereYbyI6c8iQPslibg3y1B3j2Oz67AfxiLKYahMyKRNePv_-7oGDh8hvjl9GYn_GVUmE-v1FL2w%3D%3D) We've spent the last few months getting out our message that Mike will bring America back together. Now it's time to get out the vote. [**Can you join us on Saturday to help turn out voters for Mike? We have great events happening near you.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6dc87a85cb9d4f1c9e96c20e06b9045c&_e=D2jjC1TpywPJdE2tPMUCGSCR4hWEdRD2fC-gUAf0iqA5LmYW3hORm797NNQRCBAvKkgQIAEp9oR9miiIXVOAjCFPVmHPoCCQzABygUmRoR5SrbyXkawCXKcUwa5sJTyFuaOHG882GK-hE6C3lhdM27KBTBRplu_LPAShY8UE62wRZplWVRx0n4dHpcIrbaEjkyPUlBaNpfBtvf8nZMdMvtcKJodU-iz5cMJSbiSn06laF2XAs5-gfNDjfBR46HlHYfk-b0yzmtr7PVzvJT7uk031EuMBlsWBtSzX5sm_vCTvUcFYVWQFhJZb4_hknKzVzbvU_k1R12Ld_V9PXWk78-ifB4J1dy72PY1k65feasYe6XkJ1K_FlQO32zsZn_Lc8ka-TNGrLb3PDl8YoGCNuw%3D%3D) A lot of the folks supporting Mike at canvasses and phonebanks are first-time volunteers, so if you haven't taken part before, you'll be most welcome! You'll meet great folks, have interesting conversations, and probably make a few friends. And you'll be making a real difference. You can be proud to say that -- in the most important election of our lifetimes -- you didn't stay home. **Join an event near you:** [**https://events.mikebloomberg.com**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6dc87a85cb9d4f1c9e96c20e06b9045c&_e=D2jjC1TpywPJdE2tPMUCGSCR4hWEdRD2fC-gUAf0iqA5LmYW3hORm797NNQRCBAvKkgQIAEp9oR9miiIXVOAjCFPVmHPoCCQzABygUmRoR5SrbyXkawCXKcUwa5sJTyFuaOHG882GK-hE6C3lhdM27KBTBRplu_LPAShY8UE62wRZplWVRx0n4dHpcIrbaEjw9-Ru9w0fns_1b-IosIMUuXZxuP4wLcDb7bqEVAr_4ET7yesM7cfz8Lp1lK_xDSwEafDvhtFro9nDjeo1-FneSpGxllVdqnOTM1peBA0njPZTHKdHPzYR4Ac_oSTCA68BEv4Ns1NdpSq_v28kGH2TN0fxBJIza4l1RnJsRN6md6QpQU_YJf7sp_HnR91UQgpzp1rDg3VWKS7zLfTMjYNBA%3D%3D) The strength of our campaign is unmatched, and that's all thanks to the passion and action of folks like you. Mike trusts you to get this done. So let's make him proud. I hope to see you out there, Dan Kanninen
States Director, Bloomberg 2020 P.S. -- We'll be organizing Sunday, Monday, and Tuesday in case your Saturday is booked. subject: We must flip Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/58cfbd48c04b/stop-human-trafficking-in-illinois-12208398?e=9b692867fa)
---
| [ ](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=3cd77b5483&e=9b692867fa)
---
| | | Friends,

After losing impeachment and with an election year in full swing,**Democrats are going to spend big to try to unseat Trump in November, and they will spend countless dollars trying to keep Lauren Underwood in office.**

Without strong, unwavering support from conservatives across Illinois, they will win.

We**CAN NOT** let that happen.

President Trump has fought for Illinois since the day he took office... [**but we need to continue to show him that we are with him all the way into November and beyond.**](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=4e0f091b3e&e=9b692867fa)

[**Will you chip in anything you can right now to show you’re still willing to fight for our values?**](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=91fbc6609a&e=9b692867fa)

[**It doesn’t matter whether it’s $10 or $100... We need to stay committed to flipping Illinois RED!**](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=d93cd03997&e=9b692867fa)

...and we need to start now!

Sincerely, Jerry Evans

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Can you help out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'll get straight to the point: If we don't do everything we can to protect the great Democrats who are in the U.S. Senate right now, we lose any chance of taking back the majority.
| | Derek,

**I'll get straight to the point: If we don't do everything we can to protect the great Democrats who are in the U.S. Senate right now, we lose any chance of taking back the majority. And today, my friend Tina Smith needs our help.** [**Can you chip in $10 to Senator Tina Smith's re-election campaign today?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1718/3e0906/78d4d276/3e30c0d7/427933402/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-smith?refcode=20200227_FR_TK_TS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+10+to+Senator+Tina+Smith&utm_campaign=20200227_FR_TK_TS&source=20200227_FR_TK_TS") Tina won the Minnesota Senate Special Election in November 2018, a 10-month Special Election where she had to start from scratch -- and now she's up for re-election in 2020. That puts a strain on campaign resources, and it makes it really important for folks like us to step up and help out. Since she's been in the Senate, Tina has been fighting for issues that matter to all Americans: access to high-quality, affordable health care; campaign finance reform; support for our farmers and rural communities; lower prescription drug prices; bold action on climate change; and common sense gun reform. She's leading a bipartisan effort to lower the cost of insulin products to make sure no one has to ration their insulin because they can't afford it. This is exactly what our leaders here in the Senate _should_ be focused on -- not ripping health care away from millions of families, blocking meaningful action to combat gun violence, or confirming President Trump's extreme judicial nominees without a second glance. I need Tina by my side if we're going to make progress on all these critical issues. We just can't afford to lose her seat to a Republican. But Minnesota is a top target for Trump and the GOP this year -- they've pledged to spend up to $30 million to turn the state red. **Will you help Tina and Minnesota Democrats fight back? Please pitch in today to support her campaign, and help us hold on to our Democratic seats in the Senate.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1718/3e0906/78d4d276/3e30c0d6/427933402/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-smith?refcode=20200227_FR_TK_TS&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=20200227_FR_TK_TS&source=20200227_FR_TK_TS")
---
| [**DONATE $20**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1718/3e0906/78d4d276/3e30c0d5/427933402/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-smith?refcode=20200227_FR_TK_TS&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+20&utm_campaign=20200227_FR_TK_TS&source=20200227_FR_TK_TS")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1718/3e0906/78d4d276/3e30c0d4/427933402/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-smith?refcode=20200227_FR_TK_TS&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20200227_FR_TK_TS&source=20200227_FR_TK_TS")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1718/3e0906/78d4d276/3e30c32b/427933402/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-smith?refcode=20200227_FR_TK_TS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20200227_FR_TK_TS&source=20200227_FR_TK_TS")
---
Thank you,
Tim Kaine

* * *
|

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: No one can remain on the sidelines.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| The only way we'll defeat Donald Trump is if we bring our party together. Team, As we look ahead to the presidential primaries in South Carolina, Super Tuesday, and beyond, it's so important that we unite behind whichever candidate becomes our party's nominee. As a former candidate for president himself in this race, Cory knows that we can't be divided as we head into the general election. That's why he has committed to help our party's presidential nominee -- in whichever ways he can -- to help us win back the White House this November. **[Below is the note Cory sent along after the New Hampshire primary. If you haven't taken our pledge yet to support the eventual Democratic nominee, please add your name here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200227_CBcom_20200227-pet-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** No one can remain on the sidelines during this pivotal election. The only way we'll defeat Donald Trump is if we bring our party together. Team Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, Yesterday was the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary. As we look back on one of the most critical nominating contests in this process, I have an ask for you. At this point in the primary, the race is still very uncertain. And unfortunately, the attacks are starting to escalate both among candidates and their supporters -- pushing us further away from the unity our party will need to win back the White House. During my own presidential campaign, I often spoke about the importance of joining together in common cause -- because we can't go into this fight divided. The stakes are too high to repeat the same mistakes that hurt us back in 2016. **[I'm asking you to please join me right now in taking a pledge to support the Democratic nominee in their fight against President Trump. Add your name if you'll vote for our party's candidate regardless of who wins this primary.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200227_CBcom_20200227-pet-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We saw what happened in 2016 when large parts of the Democratic base stayed at home on Election Day -- ultimately resulting in razor-thin losses in key battleground states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin. No matter who comes out of this primary as our nominee, we need to have their back -- by voting, volunteering, donating, and committing to do everything we can to win in November. I'll be eager to support whoever we declare as our nominee at the Democratic National Convention this July. **And you better believe that I 'm going to do everything in my power to help that person beat Trump.** **[Let us not be divided in the battle to defeat the most dangerous president in modern times. I hope you'll take this pledge to support our eventual Democratic nominee.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200227_CBcom_20200227-pet-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Democracy isn't a spectator sport. If there was ever a time to get off the sidelines, this is it. The nightmare we're living in demands our collective action. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200227_CBcom_20200227-pet-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa2/5fca0d19/7a3f441d/291d068c/2748695109/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa2/5fca0d19/7a3f441d/291d068b/2748695109/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa2/5fca0d19/7a3f441d/291d068a/2748695109/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa2/5fca0d19/7a3f441d/291d0689/2748695109/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Team Hunt
subject: The Final Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

This Saturday, our campaign is hosting our final Super Saturday of the Primary.

With the election less than one week away, this weekend is our last chance to get Wesley's message across to the thousands of Republicans who will cast their ballot on Tuesday. We need your help to make sure that every voter knows that Wesley is the best candidate to take on Lizzie Fletcher and the liberal establishment in Washington.

We'll be kicking off block-walks in two separate portions of our district. All you need to bring is a phone, a good pair of walking shoes and a winning attitude! We'll take care of the rest.

And if you can't help block-walk, our HQ will be open from 10am-5pm for phone banking.

Our values are under attack Friend. We need Wesley in Washington fighting for them. We hope you'll help us get him there!

And after our block-walk ends, we'll be hosting our final Meet & Greet with Wesley at Kirby Ice House from 4:30pm-6:00pm.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=64fa7fe676e24024864c527eda52f4e4&_e=Umh7frXDPuquNNBScu8QKYsAaOXSpCvmg15L_7767LreEZyH5rbQTHy8jbbBCHV6GlyqKi-Jo0WlNWJN7wX6eiZKqrSXIXtZ6ge8vbK2jIcj1z1O1kTUUxt2vHLYOxMFUm3r700uDt_A3IBZrXiPRsNfYkLF6L_RDbIWdxkvvhwGlZRvA_3Ja211f_0q1l_-3ozH41gBCBlH-moVjldmIlMb9VFKdf4OtyzQahE8Ho8ZDoRie1jlTPAzvZY-KgVhm8u21EMTgLd9lzuNYIegQUuaGjZXM8tQBIZtsYwrVuI%3D)
[Click here to RSVP](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=64fa7fe676e24024864c527eda52f4e4&_e=Umh7frXDPuquNNBScu8QKYsAaOXSpCvmg15L_7767LreEZyH5rbQTHy8jbbBCHV6GlyqKi-Jo0WlNWJN7wX6eitv8rx8aA_RyfDeJIBxuZWyXZxbtATY23CwMwol4me_qGWHUCI3KjTXC2pr13EFsEPuxSEqpBHD2L1vhFfk5vxfv8yRAKuiXHOLpjbWt2_Evm4JeST9bHN6P-R2Yznc5f78O3Ol212ybjhNZBgbNBFfG3cq1L9p98EBuWvC6_ubWZFo0-qujukgriLdJRfEFR1mkSl8gZAFK-_fGVmd0yk%3D)

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Maddie Collins
subject: bad news coming from the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
Senator Daines is taking hundreds of thousands of dollars from special interests trying to buy his way back into this seat. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7e5c59132304472e933faecfebebee1b&_e=Qo78wxEqY-9HILVhjhsFvPtSNnGKEH3dCwB4-z3ExqHYQE6azHrh4HXj2v8DbPKTp8JhoKRlRvYQhsF2Y1TC6iVhHvelXv73CkR9ZogBXFBtBjfLL5fUgr17lcfcbj8IYtjAk7Vwh93QPe2Yf7QNmjmBLRBZCao6wZmS_eWwAEwg6ArTtfb1Ctm2dsybi3WfnuGOLRac7VZpgQG6HKXlrVkpQq2dYRUxBP00hpyr5ul7Q85tDGxzGklbjtYqptTrirdvLdnfVXLAnIUIaQyINOzWPurGCOytHfOcI4-OMXwV1llWih2WOtSv4L7MbqnrFa0_cgV5iIVL2ic-VZz_uJSNv9hgUFz83G-5qVtwHggH2nI4fR0IOgJBFLTQihOsJrJwVmXGR5_YsHaVJSO8nGfRAn2ARMDCNaX-ZqWW9l9WMxI5-EYtRrZC45mpq3OLVMemcHSt2xBem5fHcTGdRvq23GpzXx4Joc2_ulKykX4%3D) Hi, I'm Maddie Collins, Wilmot's wife of nearly 30 years. I want to share with you just how disappointed we all were in the Collins household by the onslaught of bad news coming out of the Senate recently. Mitch McConnell and his supporters not only acquitted Donald Trump but recently issued a statement defending Attorney General Bill Barr after more than 2,000 former Justice Department officials called on him to resign after he intervened in the case of Roger Stone. **[This shows just how corrupt Mitch McConnell and his yes-men truly are. body:
Peter, I really think you must've missed this because... *
## DEADLINE: FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 28
---
|
Dear Peter, You've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners -- and I'm so thankful for your commitment to our critical mission... **...but I noticed you have NOT yet Renewed Your Support for 2020.** Our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** \-- and we just launched new ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate. **Peter, it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** [...that's why I'm hoping and praying you'll **RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020** with a ONE-TIME or a MONTHLY donation of $20.20 today!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYg0m&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=y&z=EMlfSjh&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EILIMjE&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYg0m&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=y&z=EyxqQNx&)
---
**With Michael Bloomberg dumping _$2 BILLION_ into defeating President Trump this election, we really need you now more than ever, Peter!**
**Tomorrow is the DEADLINE, so I hope to see your response soon.**
_For America,_
\- John
P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Peter, And so it begins... We've officially entered the Primary season with Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada behind us -- and it's still anyone's guess who the eventual Democratic nominee will be... **...but you and I don't have to wait to know that the nominee will be a tax-and-spend liberal who wants to return our country back to the Obama days...**_or worse_**!** [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EMQCSSo&) And if that's not bad enough -- now we have a liberal, gun-grabbing, "nanny"-state billionaire to contend with because... Michael Bloomberg has Committed to Spend $2 BILLION to Defeat President Trump this Election! Bloomberg's leaked strategy is to flood the states that Trump won by slim margins in 2016 including Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania... **...which all states where you and I helped Trump win by convincing minorities to vote for the President in unprecedented numbers. In fact...** Our minority voter outreach campaign (_inspired by Dr. Carson's candidacy_) turned out to be CRUCIAL in defeating Hillary Clinton and electing Donald Trump as President [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EwoPBLw&) Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I truly believe that without your help **Donald Trump would not have won.** You should be proud that you played such a vital role in making President Trump's victory possible because without you... ...we'd be suffocating under Hillary Clinton's iron-fisted regime, the Supreme Court would've shifted far-Left for decades to come, and our beloved nation would've likely never recovered. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EVrkC3U&) It's in that same spirit of saving America from radical leftists that I'm writing to you today, Peter. You see... Our Mission to Reach Out to Minority Voters Didn't End with the Election of Donald Trump In fact, the Left's horrific slide into radical socialism, unveiled hatred for America, scorched-Earth tactics, and vile assault of President Trump has added a **new sense of urgency** and **higher stakes** to our mission. That's why we've continued our highly-successful minority outreach and radio advertising campaign to expose the Left's race-baiting lies and convince minorities to abandon the Democratic Party forever... ...a campaign that was inspired by Dr. Ben Carson's presidential and our historic effort to draft him to "Run Ben Run"! began with the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Gold Every election, Democrats promise minority voters the moon and the stars in return for their votes. Then, once the election is over, they abandon their promises and turn their backs on the minority voters who secured their victory. And if that doesn't work, Democrats just slander Republicans as racists to **SCARE** minorities into voting for liberals who DO NOT share their values. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=E9WhIQO&) But we're fed up with the Democrats' never-ending lies, ruthless scare-tactics, and race-baiting slander of conservatives... ...and we're **fighting back** by reaching out to minority voters with the truth that the lying Democrats offer little more than bribes, broken promises, and failed policies that lead to nothing but more of the same: disappointment, lousy schools, poverty, victimization, and anger. [Peter, I'm praying you'll RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to help win this critical fight, but first let me explain just what is at stake.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=ESdvw7m&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EwqKIzk&) As you know, hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans like you made history when we convinced Dr. Ben Carson to run for President in 2016. **Together, we became the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Goldwater in 1964...** **...and we succeeded beyond anyone's wildest expectations in our ability to recruit minority voters to the Republican Party.** Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television and print advertisements, billboards, books and issue guides to minority voters exposing the **race-baiting lies** liberals have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans and our values for decades... And the results have been incredible. Our campaign proven, _time and time again_ , that radio outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. In fact, recent polling puts Trump's approval ratings at an astonishing 35 percent with Black Voters, 38 percent with Hispanics and 28 percent with Asians. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=Eyzbtjy&) **If President Trump ends up with even HALF of these numbers, then there's _NO WAY_ the Democrats can win this election.** **But we only have eight short months to continue chipping away at the Democrats base enough to secure a second term for President Trump.** [That's why I'm counting on you to RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to keep our highly-successful minority outreach campaign RUNNING STRONG up through Election Day!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=ECXoQhq&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EIHIFdS&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Gift of $ Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYg0m&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=y&z=E9rvhp0&)
---
I don't need to tell you that Stars and Stripes Forever PAC can't stand up to Bloomberg's **$2 BILLION** , but _we don't have to_ because...
...our cost-effective and highly-targeted strategy (_which provided Trump the margin of victory in crucial swing states in 2016_) WILL work again for his re-election.
Thanks to the support of thousands of patriotic Americans like you, Peter, our radio ads have been airing across the country **_since August_** \-- blasting out the TRUTH to carefully selected and key minority markets in crucial swing states and important Congressional races.
We're ON THE AIR right now in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, New Mexico, and Minnesota...
...and we just launched in Michigan, a _critical swing state_ where Trump-endorsed, black conservative, businessman, and veteran **John James** has a _REAL SHOT_ at taking back a U.S. Senate seat from the Democrats.
| | _"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**_He will be a star_**."_

\- President Trump on John James | [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EzaNtjf&)
---|---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=ESIjIZN&)
Dr. Ben Carson, Vice President Pence, and U.S. Senate candidate John James visiting Dr. Carson's childhood home in Detroit.
[But we MUST do more if we're going to fight back against Bloomberg's BILLIONS and push President Trump to reelection victory.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EEHDtHi&)
Not only do we need the $16,280/month to keep our current radio ads ON THE AIR...
...but we REALLY need to **DOUBLE DOWN** on the number of spots we're running and expand into other crucial swing states and races across the country.
Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I pray you'll continue your support all the way up through Election Day.
We really need you, Peter, now more than ever!
[So please RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with a _monthly_ donation of $20.20 through Election Day (_your monthly donation will automatically end on Nov 3_)...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EtNVM9M&)
[...or RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with an emergency, one-time donation of $20.20 today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYg0m&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=y&z=EVGsMj9&)
I pray I will hear back from you shortly.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. I hope that you will give my request thoughtful consideration, Peter. **We truly need you on our team, now more than ever!**
Our country can't afford the price we'll pay if Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren defeats President Trump! We NEED four more years of America First policies that are Making America Great Again.
[So please RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with a _monthly_ donation of $20.20 through Election Day (_your monthly donation will automatically end on Nov 3_)...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYgWM&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=c&z=EJ8Rh6G&)
[...or RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with an emergency, one-time donation of $20.20 today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEYg0m&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=y&z=E98JSh3&)
Thank you for your time, consideration, and of course, your support.
